authors: A collection derived from the web community (Reddit,Pinterest,DmsGuild,ecc.). For credits, authors are provided with a web link in the entity description

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: Ekaterina's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 13}, +5 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

trait.name: Shapechanger
entries: Ekaterina can use her action to polymorph into her arachne form, or back into her humanoid form. Her statistics, other than her size, are the same in each form. Any equipment she is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. She reverts to her humanoid form if she dies.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: In her arachne form, Ekaterina can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Web Walker
entries: In her arachne form, Ekaterina ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: In her humanoid form, Ekaterina can make two rapier attacks. In her arachne form, she makes three attacks, either with her rapier or her claws. She can replace any one of these with a sting attack.

action.name: Rapier
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) piercing damage.

action.name: Claw (Arachne Form Only)
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 3} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d8 + 1}) piercing damage, plus 2 ({@damage 2d1}) bludgeoning damage. At the start of each of a wounded character's turn, they take 2 damage. Any supernatural healing, like cure wounds or regeneration, or a {@dc 15} Intelligence (Medicine) ability check will remove this.

action.name: Sting (Arachne Form Only, Recharge 5-6)
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d10 + 2}) piercing damage, and the target must make a {@dc 12} Constitution saving throw, taking 22 ({@damage 4d10}) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful save. Furthermore, any creature struck with Ekaterina's stinger must pass a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw after combat, or contract a disease — an arachne egg. See The Cult Is Appeased for more.

action.name: Web (Arachne Form Only, Recharge 5-6)
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 4} to hit, range 30/60 ft., one target. {@h}3 ({@damage 1d1 + 2}) bludgeoning damage. On hit the target is {@condition restrained} by webbing. As an action, the {@condition restrained} target can make a {@dc 12} Strength check, escaping the webbing on a success. The effect ends if the webbing is destroyed. The webbing has AC 10, 5 hit points, vulnerability to fire damage, and immunity to bludgeoning, poison, and psychic damage.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: Ekaterina adds 3 to her AC against one melee attack that would hit her in humanoid form. In her arachne form, she adds 5 to her AC. To do so, she must see the attacker and be either wielding a weapon or have one or more of her arachne claws free. If she is {@condition grappled} or {@condition restrained}, she cannot perform this reaction.

{@link Ekaterina Dilisnya|https://losvaquerospress.files.wordpress.com/2020/08/ekaterina-dilisnya-v4.pdf} based on the {@link post|https://discord.com/channels/425043850084483082/425043850705502220/844450018995470386}

In her humanoid form, she resembles a fetching dusk elf maiden, with rich cocoa skin and russet red hair. She favors a slightly more risqué cut of the traditional villager garb, showing a little more skin than other women in the Village of Barovia. It is this form that those souless infected by her dreams return to night after night, until they succumb to her pleas and enter Death House. In her arachne form, her humanoid form's torso sits astride the spindly limbs of a massive black widow spider, complete with a luminescent crimson hourglass.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: Anastrasya regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point and hasn’t taken radiant damage since its last turn.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: Anastrasya can climb even on difficult surfaces and upside down on ceilings.

trait.name: Vampire Weaknesses
entries: Anastrasya has the following flaws:
{@i Forbiddance.} Ludmilla can't enter a residence without an invitation from one of the occupants.
{@i Harmed by Running Water.} Ludmilla takes 20 acid damage when she ends her turn in running water.

{@i Stake to the Heart.} Ludmilla is destroyed if a piercing weapon made of wood is driven into her heart while she is {@condition incapacitated} in her resting place, she is {@condition paralyzed} until the stake is removed.
{@i Sunlight Hypersensitivity.} Ludmilla takes 20 radiant damage when she starts her turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, she has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Anastrasya makes two attacks, only one of which can be a bite attack.

action.name: Grab
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) bludgeoning damage. The target is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 16}).

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target that is {@condition grappled}, {@condition incapacitated}, {@condition restrained}, or willing. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d10 + 5}) piercing damage, plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) necrotic damage. The target’s hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage dealt, and Anastrasya regains this number of hit points. The reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. If the target is reduced to 0 hit points by this attack, it dies.

action.name: Reaping Greatsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 10 ft., up to 3 targets. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d6 + 6}) slashing damage, plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it makes a {@dc 17} Strength saving throw, falling {@condition prone} on a failure.

action.name: Charm (Gaze)
entries: Anastrasya magically targets a creature within 30 feet, forcing it to make a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw. If the target has at least one level of strife, it makes this saving throw with disadvantage. On a failure, the target is {@condition charmed} by Anastrasya for 24 hours. While {@condition charmed} it regards her as a trusted friend and is a willing target for her bite. The target repeats the saving throw each time it takes damage, ending the effect on itself on a success. If the target’s saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, it is immune to her Charm for 24 hours.  She can only have one target {@condition charmed} at a time.

action.name: Shapechange
entries: Anastrasya transforms into the shape of a Medium or smaller beast (typically a wolf, or bat, or a cloud of mist) or back into her true form. While transformed, she has the beast’s size and movement modes. She can’t use reactions, and can’t speak. Otherwise, she uses her own statistics. Anything she’s carrying transforms with her.

reaction.name: Hissing Scuttle (1/Day)
entries: When Anastrasya takes radiant damage, she moves up to her Speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

{@b {@link Anastrasya Karelova|https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1yafwyRZXEgJNM-jYw3L_5wIHfeg12roH} based on the {@link post|https://www.reddit.com/r/CurseofStrahd/comments/vobq5a/curse_of_strahd_major_npcs/} }

A diplomat and warrior both, Anastrasya is well-equipped to hold her own on the battlefield and in the ballroom. When Strahd requires a diplomatic emissary to the PCs, Anastrasya is his first choice—especially if a betrayal is in the cards.
When not needed elsewhere by Strahd or resting in her coffin in Strahd’s tomb, Anastrasya can most often be found in area K37 (Study).
{@b TREASURE}

Anastrasya wears a black and crimson silk head scarf sewn with precious jewels (worth 750 gp), and a platinum necklace with a black opal pendant (worth 1,500 gp).  In her tomb is a red wedding gown (worth 500 gp).
